_comment: Single source of truth for the nightly playback telemetry matrix. Edit here, nowhere else. Consumed by playback-master.yml discover job.

_notes.leg_naming: android-<marketing-version>-api-<level>-<device-profile>. Follow the least-model rule when picking a device profile in a generation (Pixel base, not Pro/Fold).
_notes.runtime_origin: 'preinstalled' would mean the AVD system image ships on the runner. In practice all google_apis images are downloaded at job time on ubuntu-latest; keeping the key parallel to iOS for readability.
_notes.ssai_leg: ssai-mediatailor-lifecycle is Android-only (iOS does not currently ship a MediaTailor tracker). Drop from the scenario list to reach parity with iOS's five-scenario default.
_notes.device_profiles: Must be present in `avdmanager list device` on the runner's SDK. As of ubuntu-latest in 2026-07 pixel_8 / pixel_7 are NOT in that list — pixel_6 is the newest device that ships with the runner's command-line-tools. Update this note if that changes.
_notes.dropped_api26: android-8-api-26-pixel-2 removed 2026-07-13: SDK Platform 26 image download is flaky on ubuntu-latest (ZipFile corruption), and on the runs where it does boot the SSAI leg hangs the job to the 45-min timeout. Re-add if API 26 coverage becomes necessary.
